data.title: BYRN INC. Delays Annual 10-K Yearly Filing
data.description:
Born Inc ( (BRRN) ) has released a notification of late filing.

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Born Inc., now operating as BYRN INC., has filed a Form 12b-25 to notify investors of a delay in submitting its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the financial year ended December 31, 2025. The company’s annual filing on Form 10-K (Yearly Report) is therefore not being submitted by the original SEC deadline.

Management explains that it could not complete the compilation of the necessary financial information in time to finalize the Form 10-K (Yearly Report). According to the filing, submitting the report on schedule would have required unreasonable effort or expense, and the company opted to use the permitted extension instead.

BYRN INC. states that it expects to file the delayed Form 10-K (Yearly Report) within the standard SEC extension window. Under Rule 12b-25, this means the annual report should be submitted no later than 15 calendar days after its prescribed due date, assuming no further complications arise.

The company indicates that all other required periodic filings over the past 12 months have been made on time. It also does not anticipate any significant change in its results of operations compared with the prior fiscal year, signaling that the delay is procedural rather than driven by a major earnings surprise.

No preliminary financial results or detailed forward-looking projections are provided in the notification, and the company refrains from hinting at material revisions to past numbers. Investors should nonetheless treat the timing statements as forward-looking in nature, as they depend on the completion of the remaining financial work.

BYRN INC. emphasizes its intention to remain in compliance with SEC reporting rules by using the formal extension mechanism and completing the outstanding annual report. The notification is signed by Chief Executive Officer David Lazar on March 31, 2026, underscoring executive-level oversight of the delayed Form 10-K (Yearly Report) process.

More about Born Inc

Average Trading Volume: 272

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $27.97M

See more insights into BRRN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Allied Gold Shareholders Overwhelmingly Back Zijin Gold Arrangement
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Allied Gold Corporation ( (TSE:AAUC) ) is now available.

Allied Gold shareholders have overwhelmingly approved a previously announced plan of arrangement with Zijin Gold International, clearing a key hurdle for the proposed transaction. More than 61% of outstanding common shares were represented at the special meeting, with over 99% of votes cast, both in total and excluding interested parties, supporting the deal.

The strong backing from shareholders signals confidence in Allied Gold’s strategic partnership with Zijin Gold, which is expected to shape the company’s future growth trajectory in Africa’s gold sector. The approval positions Allied Gold to move ahead with remaining court and regulatory steps, potentially bolstering its financial resources and competitive standing among global gold producers if the transaction is completed.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AAUC) stock is a Hold with a C$44.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Allied Gold Corporation stock, see the TSE:AAUC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AAUC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AAUC is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak profitability and deteriorating free cash flow despite strong revenue growth and manageable leverage. Offsetting this, the latest earnings call was constructive with reaffirmed production guidance, strong operating cash flow, improving costs, and a solid cash position. Technically, the trend is positive, but very overbought momentum indicators increase near-term pullback risk; valuation is also pressured by losses and a negative P/E.

To see Spark’s full report on AAUC stock, click here.

More about Allied Gold Corporation

Allied Gold Corporation is a Canadian-based gold producer with a portfolio of three producing mines and development projects in Côte d’Ivoire, Mali, and Ethiopia. Led by experienced mining executives, the company is pursuing exploration, construction, and operational improvements to evolve into a mid-tier, next-generation African gold producer and ultimately a leading senior global gold company.

data.title: Dye & Durham Adopts New Rights Plan to Shield Ongoing Sales Process
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Dye & Durham ( (TSE:DND) ).

Dye & Durham has adopted a new shareholder rights plan as its existing plan nears expiry, aiming to protect the integrity of its ongoing sales process for the whole company and its Canadian Financial Services division. The move is designed to give the board more time to evaluate potential transactions in an orderly way and to ensure all shareholders are treated fairly during the review of strategic alternatives.

The rights plan, broadly aligned with similar measures at other Canadian issuers, seeks to deter creeping takeovers by restricting investors who already control 20% or more of the stock from increasing their stake outside a permitted bid. It remains subject to Toronto Stock Exchange acceptance and shareholder ratification at a special meeting expected in June 2026, after which it could stay in place for up to three years if approved.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:DND) stock is a Hold with a C$4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Dye & Durham stock, see the TSE:DND Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on DND Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DND is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance—declining revenue, ongoing net losses, and especially very high leverage—despite positive (but weakening) free cash flow. Technicals are supportive due to strong recent price momentum, though overbought signals temper that benefit. Valuation is constrained by negative earnings, while the earnings call adds some offsetting positives from cost-savings and deleveraging actions, but near-term operating declines remain a key risk.

To see Spark’s full report on DND stock, click here.

More about Dye & Durham

Dye & Durham Limited is a technology company that provides practice management software for legal professionals, data insights to support corporate transactions, and payments infrastructure used by governments and financial institutions. The company operates across Canada, the United Kingdom, Ireland, Australia, and South Africa, serving clients in highly regulated, transaction-intensive markets.

Average Trading Volume: 285,796

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Quebec Silica Resources Corp. ( (TSE:QIMC) ) just unveiled an update.

Québec Innovative Materials Corp. reported that shareholders overwhelmingly backed all resolutions at its March 30 annual general and special meeting, with each motion receiving more than 99% approval. About 21.31% of outstanding shares were represented, and investors confirmed a four-member board, reappointed Baker Tilly WM LLP as auditor, and ratified both the shareholder rights plan and the share compensation plan.

Chief executive John Karagiannidis said the strong vote underscores investor confidence in the company’s governance and strategic direction as it advances its natural hydrogen portfolio in Canada and the U.S. The approval of the rights and compensation plans strengthens QIMC’s corporate framework as it pursues disciplined exploration of its district-scale projects guided by its proprietary R2G2 technical approach.

More about Quebec Silica Resources Corp.

Québec Innovative Materials Corp. is a North American exploration and development company focused on natural hydrogen and critical mineral projects. It is advancing a district-scale hydrogen exploration model across Québec, Ontario, Nova Scotia, and Minnesota using its proprietary R2G2 framework, with an emphasis on sustainable development and clean energy applications.

data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Trillion Energy International ( (TSE:TCF) ) has shared an announcement.

Trillion Energy International is sharpening its Turkish-focused upstream portfolio, balancing oil and natural gas assets across the M47 block in the Cudi-Gabar province, the South Akcakoca Sub-Basin gas field in the Black Sea, and the Cendere oil field. The company aims to use its technical expertise and established presence in Türkiye to secure additional value-accretive oil and gas opportunities in the region.

In its latest corporate update, Trillion urged shareholders to participate in its annual general meeting, where routine governance matters and a long-term equity incentive plan will be put to a vote. Operationally, it is seeking buyers for its 49% stake in the SASB gas project, has signed a new agreement to earn a 29% working interest in the M47 block via up to US$15 million of spending on wells and seismic, cancelled prior farm-in deals on M47, M46C and M46D, and continues to evaluate further upstream transactions across Türkiye and neighboring markets.

data.title: Ynvisible Closes Second Tranche of Private Placement to Bolster Working Capital
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Ynvisible Interactive Inc ( (TSE:YNV) ) has shared an update.

Ynvisible Interactive Inc. has closed the second tranche of its non-brokered private placement, issuing 3,169,000 units at $0.10 each for gross proceeds of $316,900, with each unit comprising one common share and a three-year warrant exercisable at $0.14. The funds, which are subject to a statutory hold period until August 1, 2026, will be directed to working capital and general corporate purposes, while a modest finder’s fee was paid in connection with the financing.

The round included participation by director Michael Kott, who acquired 850,000 units through a wholly owned company, constituting a related-party transaction under Canadian securities rules but falling within exemptions that avoid formal valuation and minority shareholder approval. By advancing this private placement, Ynvisible bolsters its near-term liquidity and operational flexibility as it continues to position its printed e-paper display technology in cost-sensitive IoT and smart-label markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:YNV) stock is a Sell with a C$0.13 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ynvisible Interactive Inc stock, see the TSE:YNV Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on YNV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, YNV is a Underperform.

Ynvisible Interactive Inc. receives a low overall stock score due to significant financial performance challenges, bearish technical indicators, and concerning valuation metrics. The company’s ongoing losses, negative margins, and lack of profitability are major concerns. Additionally, the stock’s technical analysis indicates a strong downtrend, and the negative P/E ratio highlights valuation issues. Without any positive earnings call insights or corporate events to offset these factors, the stock’s outlook remains negative.

To see Spark’s full report on YNV stock, click here.

More about Ynvisible Interactive Inc

Ynvisible Interactive Inc. is a Vancouver-based company operating in the low-cost, ultra-low-power display industry, focusing on sustainable electronics and roll-to-roll printed e-paper technology. Its printed electrochromic displays target cost-sensitive, low-power applications such as digital signage, smart monitoring labels for supply chains, medical and diagnostic indicators, and retail labels, supported by its expertise in materials, inks, and IoT-integrated systems.

data.title: Regulus Resources Adopts Poison Pill as AntaKori Sulphide Project Advances
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Regulus Resources ( (TSE:REG) ).

Regulus Resources has adopted a shareholder rights plan aimed at preventing coercive or creeping takeover bids by making it costly for any investor to acquire 20% or more of its shares without launching a permitted bid. The plan, which grants existing shareholders the right to buy additional stock at a significant discount if triggered, is subject to TSX Venture Exchange approval and must be ratified by shareholders within six months, positioning the company to better control any future change-of-control scenarios.

Operationally, Regulus reported that completion of a long-awaited mineral resource estimate for the integrated Tantahuatay-AntaKori sulphide copper-gold project is in its final documentation stage after delays stemming from differing technical approaches among participating groups. The company also continues metallurgical testing with Nuton’s bio-leaching technology at AntaKori and is progressing community engagement and permitting for additional exploration and drilling on nearby claims, steps that could materially influence project development timelines and future value creation for stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:REG) stock is a Hold with a C$4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Regulus Resources stock, see the TSE:REG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on REG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, REG is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by pre-revenue operations with ongoing losses and cash burn, partially offset by a low-leverage balance sheet with substantial equity. Technical signals are broadly neutral-to-weak, and valuation support is limited due to negative earnings and no dividend yield provided.

To see Spark’s full report on REG stock, click here.

More about Regulus Resources

Regulus Resources Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on advancing the AntaKori copper-gold project in Peru. The company is active in large-scale sulphide copper-gold systems and collaborates with partners, including nearby mine operator Coimolache and Rio Tinto venture Nuton, to evaluate resource potential and processing technologies in a key Andean mining district.

data.title: Jushi Posts Modest 2025 Revenue Growth, Extends Debt Maturities to 2029
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Jushi Holdings ( (TSE:JUSH) ) has shared an announcement.

Jushi Holdings reported 2025 revenue of $262.9 million, up 2% year over year, with gross profit of $114 million and an Adjusted EBITDA margin of 19.1%, while still posting a net loss of $68.6 million. Management highlighted operational gains in cultivation performance and product availability, as well as the growing contribution of Jushi-branded products, which reached 58% of retail revenue in its five vertical markets.

The company expanded its retail footprint to 42 dispensaries by year-end 2025, driven by eight new store openings, including its first New Jersey location and multiple new sites in Ohio. Post year-end, Jushi refinanced roughly $132.3 million of debt with a new $160 million secured term loan due 2029, extending maturities and boosting liquidity as it positions for growth, including potential upside from Virginia’s approved adult-use cannabis framework pending gubernatorial sign-off.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:JUSH) stock is a Hold with a C$0.81 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Jushi Holdings stock, see the TSE:JUSH Stock Forecast page.

Jushi Holdings’ overall stock score reflects significant financial challenges, particularly in profitability and leverage, which are the most impactful factors. While there are positive signs in revenue growth and operational improvements, these are counterbalanced by increased net losses and valuation concerns. Curaleaf Holdings, Inc., a major international cannabis consumer products company with operations across medical and adult-use markets and a vertically integrated presence in Europe, Canada, and Australasia, continues to expand its portfolio through brands such as Curaleaf, Select, Grassroots, Find, and Anthem. The company announced it will release its financial and operational results for the first quarter of 2026 after markets close on May 5, 2026, followed by a management-hosted conference call and webcast, signaling upcoming insights into its performance and strategic trajectory for investors and industry stakeholders.

The scheduled call, set for 5:00 p.m. ET on May 5, will feature prepared remarks and a question-and-answer session focused on operational and financial highlights, and a replay will be available for those unable to attend live. This disclosure timeline positions Curaleaf to update the market on early 2026 trends in its international cannabis operations, potentially providing clarity on growth initiatives, competitive positioning, and broader sector dynamics following the quarter’s close.

Organto Foods ( (TSE:OGO) ) has provided an update.

Organto Foods has expanded its leadership team to support rapid growth, now operating at a weekly sales level of about C$2 million, implying an annual run rate near C$100 million. The company has reassigned Chief Operating Officer Bob Kouw to focus on strategic M&A and treasury, while elevating executives from the acquired New Fruit Group and internal talent into key roles overseeing European operations, business development, and digital technology.

The refreshed leadership structure is designed to manage an expanding retail customer base, particularly among leading European retailers and in markets such as Switzerland, Ukraine, and Spain. Alongside these appointments, Organto has broadened its grower network and logistics capabilities, adding new sea freight partners and ports to improve supply continuity, scalability, and its positioning for long-term growth and value creation for stakeholders.
